ocr_findings.issue: Term surface 'ベストソリューションズ' (Best Solutions) does not exist in OCR. OCR source reads 'ベネトレーションテスト' (the source itself OCRs 'ベネトレーション' for 'ペネトレーションテスト' / Penetration Test). The structurer fabricated 'ベストソリューションズ' and propagated to zh '最佳解决方案' and en 'Best Solutions'; both semantically wrong. Definition text matches Penetration Test semantics, confirming the headword is wrong.

Term surface 'シングルパスワード' (Single Password) does not exist in OCR. OCR shows 'ワンタイムパスワード' (One-Time Password). Definition '一度しか使えないパスワード' matches OTP. zh '单密码' and en 'Single Password' propagate the wrong headword; should be 一次性密码 / One-Time Password.

Surface '完全' / '完全' / 'Complete' — the OCR source headword is '完全性' (Integrity), a core CIA-triad term. Definition '改ざんされていないデータ' (untampered data) is exactly the textbook definition of 完全性. Surface lost the final 性 character; en should be 'Integrity'; zh should be '完整性'.

definition.jp contains garbled fragment '含めの活動に存在する危険を発生するもゆるリスク'. OCR source is '会社の活動に伴って発生するあらゆるリスク' (all risks arising from corporate activities). The structurer corrupted '会社'→'含め', '伴って'→'に存在する', 'あらゆる'→'もゆる'. zh and en guessed the right meaning, but JP source-of-truth is corrupted.

デジタル署名 definition 'なりすましのデータを送るために、秘密鍵を使用する' (uses private key TO SEND SPOOFED DATA) inverts the meaning. OCR source on p.566 says digital signatures DETECT spoofing/tampering. zh '为了发送冒名顶替的数据而使用私钥' and en faithfully render the wrong JP. Textbook-incorrect and will mislead learners.

ショルダーハック definition is only 'のぞき見防止フィルムを貼ること' (apply privacy filter). That describes the COUNTERMEASURE, not the attack. A glossary entry should define ショルダーハック as 'over-the-shoulder snooping of input'. Misleading as-is.

definition.jp 'PCのお初期化やCOSの組み合わせを最初から考慮して、出荷時にOSのセキュリティの設定を行うこと' contains garbled tokens: 'お初期化' (お spurious), 'COS' (likely OCR corruption of OS). This セキュリティ・バイ・デフォルト entry is not in the OCR source for p.566 bullet list — looks hallucinated or carried from another page. zh and en propagate the garbled idea.

バイオメトリクス認証 definition lists 'ネットトレース' as a behavioral biometric example. OCR source lists '筆跡、キーストローク' (handwriting, keystroke). 'ネットトレース' is not a recognized biometric modality; appears to be structurer corruption. zh '网络追踪' and en 'net tracing' faithfully but wrongly propagate.

translation_findings.issue: DMZ definition zh '作为企业网络与外部网络之间存在的区域而被隔离的网络区域' and en 'An isolated network area that exists as a region between the corporate network and external networks' are awkward/redundant. Minor.
